name: Bat, the Forest Ninja
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>忍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> バット
desc: If a face-up card is in a Field Zone, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Bat, the Forest Ninja" once per turn this way. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned and "Fairy Tale Prologue: Journey's Dawn" is in your field or GY: You can add 1 LIGHT Beast monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Bat, the Forest Ninja" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a face-up card is in a Field Zone, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Bat, the Forest Ninja" once per turn this way. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned and "Fairy Tale Prologue: Journey's Dawn" is in your field or GY: You can add 1 LIGHT Beast monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Bat, the Forest Ninja" once per turn.
eff: If a face-up card is in a Field Zone, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Bat, the Forest Ninja" once per turn this way. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned and "Fairy Tale Prologue: Journey's Dawn" is in your field or GY: You can add 1 LIGHT Beast monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Bat, the Forest Ninja" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
misc: Requires card in a Field Zone
